case_title: LORIE PACITA MOORE VS. REY G. SAYSON

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, LORIE PACITA AS TO DEFENDANT SAYSON, REY G.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, LORIE PACITA SERVED SEP-06-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAYSON, REY G.
